result.evidence_summary: Only one indirect mention found on a Nordic skiing club website describing the 'Tour de Gaspe' as a multi-day ski event in the Gaspe Peninsula, Quebec, but no official website, race results, news articles, listings in major series, social media, videos, or registration pages were identified. Tourism sites highlight general cross-country skiing in Gaspésie but do not reference this specific race. No concrete evidence of it being an organized, recurring event.
